cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out who ends up with which present after all these swaps. The question is asking what gift Bob has at the end. The options are brown, orange, purple, yellow, or white. Let me start by listing out the initial gifts each person has. So initially: - Alice has a brown present. - Bob has an orange ball. - Claire has a purple present. - Dave has a yellow present. - Eve has a white present. Now, the swaps happen in the following order: 1. Bob and Eve swap. 2. Bob and Claire swap. 3. Dave and Alice swap. 4. Bob and Eve swap again. 5. Alice and Bob swap. Let me track each step one by one. It might be helpful to make a table or just keep track in my mind. Starting with the first swap between Bob and Eve. Bob originally has the orange ball, and Eve has the white present. After they swap, Bob now has the white present, and Eve has the orange ball. So after swap 1: - Alice: brown - Bob: white - Claire: purple - Dave: yellow - Eve: orange Next, swap 2 between Bob and Claire. Bob has white, Claire has purple. After swapping, Bob now has purple, and Claire has white. After swap 2: - Alice: brown - Bob: purple - Claire: white - Dave: yellow - Eve: orange Then swap 3 between Dave and Alice. Dave has yellow, Alice has brown. Swapping, Dave gets brown, Alice gets yellow. After swap 3: - Alice: yellow - Bob: purple - Claire: white - Dave: brown - Eve: orange Then swap 4: Bob and Eve swap again. Bob has purple, Eve has orange. After swap, Bob gets orange, Eve gets purple. After swap 4: - Alice: yellow - Bob: orange - Claire: white - Dave: brown - Eve: purple Then the final swap, swap 5: Alice and Bob swap. Alice has yellow, Bob has orange. After swapping, Alice gets orange, Bob gets yellow. After swap 5: - Alice: orange - Bob: yellow - Claire: white - Dave: brown - Eve: purple So according to this, Bob ends up with the yellow present. Looking at the options, (D) is yellow. Let me double-check each swap to make sure I didn't make a mistake. First swap: Bob (orange) and Eve (white) swap. Correct. Bob has white. Second swap: Bob (white) and Claire (purple) swap. Bob has purple. Correct. Third swap: Dave (yellow) and Alice (brown) swap. Dave has brown, Alice has yellow. Correct. Fourth swap: Bob (purple) and Eve (orange) swap. Bob has orange, Eve has purple.
